scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const srcDir='src/components'; const destDir='dist/components'; if (fs.existsSync(srcDir)) { if (!fs.existsSync(destDir)) fs.mkdirSync(destDir, {recursive:true}); fs.readdirSync(srcDir).filter(f=>f.endsWith('.css')).forEach(f=>fs.copyFileSync(path.join(srcDir,f), path.join(destDir,f))) }"
